name: Loren Creek | Part II
description:
"Whose baby is it? Is it his or is it mine?"

· · ──── ·𖥸· ──── · ·

Even toughest men would crumble if they went through what he's going through. His wife of five years had cheated on him. Having sex with a random man he didn't know in their own bed. The bed where he would whisper sweet nothings to her ear. Promising a future where they would hold their little baby's fingers, cooing and laughing in the four walls of their home.

But his tragedy didn't end there.

Handling a file report given by his colleague, he realized his mistake. That night when his wife was in bed with another man, it wasn't consensual. Their home had been trespassed, his wife was forcedly used by that man. And Loren had walked in on them. But he didn't do anything. He just left. Leaving his wife in the hands of the monster.

And now standing in front of him was his wife with a pregnant stomach. He had to know. Was the baby his or not?

· · ──── ·𖥸· ──── · ·
